title: Axiom connected hotbars
description: Makes the texture of hotbars in Axiom mod connected
body:
# Axiom connected hotbars

This resource pack makes the texture of hotbars in [**Axiom**](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) mod connected. [**Connected Hotbar Forked**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/connected-hotbar-forked) was taken as a reference for the texture. There is also a dark theme

That's all!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wTado6KmL0o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
